mapper.sql: id, username, email, name, PARSENAME(REPLACE(department, N' - ', N'.'), 1) as department, company, role, password, active, created_at, modified_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tb_user ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM tb_user ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tb_user WHERE username = #{username}) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tb_user WHERE email = #{email}) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_user (username, email, name, department, company, role, password, active, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{email}, #{name}, #{department}, #{company}, #{role}, #{password}, #{active}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_user SET username = #{username}, email = #{email}, name = #{name}, department = #{department}, company = #{company}, role = #{role}, password = #{password}, active = #{active}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_user SET role = #{role}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
